---
title: "The brightness of lectins conjugated to quantum dots"
date: 2025-04-01
author:
  - name: Lima, João V. A.
  - name: Oliveira, Weslley F.
  - name: Silva, Abdênego R.
  - name: Melo, Francisco P. T.
  - name: Ribeiro, Martha S.
  - name: Cabral Filho, Paulo E.
  - name: Fontes, Adriana
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Biophysical Reviews"
  volume: 17
  issue: 2
  doi: "10.1007/s12551-025-01283-0"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">The brightness of lectins conjugated to quantum dots</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
